content.text:
I located each requested responsibility in the repository:

1. Subprocess spawner (single point of CLI drift): tests/helpers/session-runner.ts
2. Fixture loader + frontmatter/ground-truth parser: tests/helpers/fixtures.ts
3. Rubric-based LLM judging and the deterministic outcomeJudge scorer: tests/helpers/llm-judge.ts
4. Free static-gate validation of fixtures and rubrics: tests/static-gate.test.ts

All four paths are confirmed present in the repository.
